summary: Detailed line-by-line source-target comparison performed. E.Y. header properly localized. All dialogue and narrative translated accurately. Key characters (Harry, Hermione, Draco, Malfoy) properly rendered with correct terminology. Word count ratio 1.303 (8,848 EN words to 11,529 VI words) consistent with normal EN→VI expansion. No omission, mistranslation, untranslated English, MT artifacts, or terminology issues found.
